retry_reason: kref_get_unless_zero fails only when the refcount is zero, indicating the object is already destroyed or being torn down; retrying cannot revive the object.
contract_summary: Conditional get-wrapper: acquires a kref reference on the bsg_job object only if its refcount is non‑zero (object still alive). Returns 1 on success (caller holds a reference) and 0 on failure (object is dead/dying). On success, the caller must later release the reference via a corresponding put (e.g., bsg_job_put). On failure, the caller must not use the job pointer. No locks or RCU requirements are imposed by this function.
